characters.name: Ernie
characters.description: ErniePhysical descriptionGenderMaleAppearancesSeriesMatlock Ernieis a supporting character, (played by legendary character actorMickey Jones) who appears inMatlockSeason 6, Episode 1,“The Outcast: Part 1.”He is a local resident of the small mountain communityBengets stuck in on his way to his much needed fishing trip. Ernie is a mechanic, and is part of the town’s tight‑knit circle; a group marked by long‑standing relationships, unspoken tensions, and a shared reluctance to let outsiders dig too deeply into their affairs. His presence helps illustrate the insular nature of the town and the complicated web of loyalties thatMatlockmust navigate to uncover the truth. Ernieis introduced as a somewhat friendly but guarded member of the mountain community at the center ofThe Outcast: Part 1storyline. He's the mechanicMatlocktakes his car to after the accident, but fails to give any assistance.

characters.name: Alfie Kingston
characters.description: Alfred KingstonNicknamesAlfieRelativesEllie Kingston(mother)Madeline Kingston(grandmother)Edwin Kingston(grandfather)Elizabeth(grandaunt)OccupationStudentBiographical informationStatusAlivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorDark brownEye colorDark brownAppearancesPortrayed byAaron D. HarrisSeriesMatlock(2024)Debut"Pilot"Alfred 'Alfie' Edwin Kingston[1]is the 12-year-old grandson tech genius ofMadelineandEdwin Kingston, and the son ofEllie Kingston. He appears in the 2024 television seriesMatlockand is portrayed byAaron D. Harris. As part of Madeline's revenge plan. Alfred uses his tech-savvy skill to help Madeline in hacking into electronic devices in Jacobson Moore to uncover hidden file related to the death of his late mother.

characters.name: Leanne MacIntyre
characters.description: Leanne MacIntyreRelativesBen Matlock(Father)Charlene Matlock(Sister)Biographical informationMarital statusDivorcedPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleAppearancesSeriesMatlockLeanne MacIntyre(neeMatlock) is Matlock's other daughter. After divorcing her husband, of whom her father did not much approve, she moves back to Atlanta to help him with his legal practice. She assists her father for three years before leaving for her own practice. During that time, she works with her father on numerous cases, including defending him on one occasion. They once found themselves on opposite sides of a divorce case, though she also defends her father in a personal injury case simultaneously during the same episode. Leanne uses the same courtroom techniques her father at times, which often results in her clients being proven innocent. In the Season 9 episode, The Accused, it's implied that Leanne may now be living in Los Angeles. She left the show in 1994.

characters.name: Ben Matlock
characters.description: Ben MatlockAliasesMatlockRelativesunnamed wife (deceased);Charlene Matlock,Leanne MacIntyre(daughters);Charlie Matlock(father, deceased)Biographical informationMarital statusWidowedBorn1926StatusDeceasedCause of deathHeart attackPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorGrayAppearancesSeriesMatlockBenjamin Leighton "Ben" Matlockis a fictional character from the television seriesMatlockand played byAndy Griffith. Matlock is a renowned, folksy yet cantankerous defense attorney who is worth every penny of his hefty fees (his retainer alone is $100,000). Known for visiting the scene of the crime to discover clues otherwise overlooked and his down-home style of coming up with viable, alternative theories of the crime in question (usually murder) while sitting in his office playing the banjo or polishing his shoes. Matlock also had conspicuously finicky fashion sense and an insatiable appetite for hot dogs. Despite his high fees and apparent wealth, he is something of a cheapskate. Andy Griffith initially did not like the character due to his vanity and cheapness. Matlock is reported to be based on Georgia defense attorney Bobby Lee Cook. Benjamin Leighton Matlock was born inMt. Harlan, North Carolina in 1927. His father wasCharles "Charlie" Matlock, was an auto repairman and owned a garage in town. After high school, Ben worked for nine years, before attending Harvard School of Law, where he was significantly older than his classmates, and often looked down because of his age and humble background. He graduated from Harvard in 1957, and moved to Atlanta to begin his career, disappointing the residents of Mt. Harlan who assumed he would be coming home and take up the shingle of "town lawyer." He served as a prosecutor in the Atlanta district attorney's office for a number of years before he decided he wanted to defend the innocent instead, and left to begin his private practice. Either during or shortly after law school, Ben married and had two daughters,LeeanneandCharlene, both of whom would become lawyers as well and work with their father at different stages in their careers. Ben was widowed sometime prior to the 1980s.

Benjamin Leighton Matlock was born inMt. Harlan, North Carolina in 1927. His father wasCharles "Charlie" Matlock, was an auto repairman and owned a garage in town. characters.name: Charlene Matlock
characters.description: Charlene MatlockRelativesBen Matlock(Father)Leanne MacIntyre(Sister)Biographical informationMarital statusSinglePhysical descriptionGenderFemaleAppearancesSeriesMatlockCharlene Matlockis a main character inMatlock. She is Matlock's youngest daughter and is also a lawyer. She assists her father at his law practice in Atlanta for a short time, appearing only in the first season of the series. She was orginally played by Lori Lethin who appeared in the pilot "Diary of a Perfect Murder", before the character was portrayed by Linda Purl for one season. It's explained later by her father that Charlene moved to Philadelphia and started her own firm there.

characters.name: Madeline Matlock
characters.description: Madeline KingstonNicknamesMattyGrammy (byAlfie)AliasesMadeline MatlockRelativesEdwin Kingston(husband)Ellie Kingston(daughter)Alfie Kingston(grandson)Elizabeth(sister)OccupationJunior AssociateLawyer (formerly)AffiliationJacobson MooreBiographical informationMarital statusMarriedStatusAlivePhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHair colorGrayEye colorBlueAppearancesPortrayed byKathy BatesSeriesMatlock(2024)Debut"Pilot"Madeline 'Matty' Matlock(formerlyMadeline Kingston)[1]is the main protagonist ofMatlock. She is a former retired lawyer and currently a junior associate atJacobson Mooreand is portrayed byKathy Bates. Matty's daughter,Ellie, died after a long battle with opioid addiction, which left her and husbandEdwinto take care of their grandson,Alfie. After discovering that someone from Jacobson Moore had the opportunity to take opioids off the market but didn't, Matty decided to infiltrate the firm to discover who was responsible and gather evidence to finally get justice for her daughter. She takes the alias "Madeline Matlock" to honor her daughter's love of the original series.
